name: Raiden Resources Limited
summary: Raiden Resources Limited, together with its subsidiaries, explores for mineral properties in the Republic of Serbia and the Republic of Bulgaria. It primarily explores for copper and gold deposits. The company holds 100% interests in the Donje Nevlje, Velika Zupa, Zapadni Majdanpek, and Majdanpek Pojas projects. Raiden Resources Limited is based in West Perth, Australia.
